creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
This is the most exhilarating water activity in Dubai! 

Hero OdySea is Dubai’s first self-drive boat tour!  Here are the highlights of the experience: 

🧑‍✈️ Become a captain for 60 or 90 minutes. No license required.
🌊 Cruise in the Arabian Gulf and see Dubai’s amazing skyline from a unique perspective. Famous points of interest are Ain Dubai, Atlantis, Burj Al Arab (you can even see Burj Khalifa along the way), and Dubai Marina.
🦺 It’s a fun, safe, and thrilling water adventure! A Hero Guide will be with you throughout the experience and share interesting stories in every photo stop. 
💰Dubai Signature Boat Tour: 795 AED for 2 persons 
📍Departure/Return Location: Dubai Harbour, Marina Zone A

Tag your adventure buddy!

P.S. Thanks to our Hero Guide @arminjohnvo for taking awesome photos and videos!
